Name: Ultravisor
Tagline: Process supervision with scheduled tasks, distributed nodes, and LLM integration for automated workflows

		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48

					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="24" fill="#58b6ea"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"

			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">U</text>
